name: Thosai
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black gram and fenugreek seeds in water until soft.
2. Chop the onion and chili pepper. Drain the soaked gram and fenugreek, then blend with rice flour, parboiled rice, and enough water to form a batter. Add salt and turmeric powder.
3. Heat oil in a pan. Fry the chopped onion and chili, curry leaves, and cumin seeds until fragrant.
4. Lower heat and pour the batter into the hot pan to create a thin pancake. Cook until small holes appear on one side.
5. Carefully flip the thosai and cook for an additional minute or two on the other side.
6. Repeat the process with any remaining batter.
From "A taste of Sri Lanka" by Indra Jayasekera, ISBN #962 224 010 0
